title: Resource APIs, Idempotency, Concurrency, Pagination, and Consistency · Inference Brief: Idempotency Key Fingerprint
summary: The API exposes table-shaped routes, replays writes by key without comparing content, uses offset pagination under mutation, and publishes events outside transaction consistency. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts idempotency key fingerprint increment in consistent resource API and operation ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Scope idempotency keys to principal and operation, compare canonical request fingerprints, store outcome atomically, expire deliberately, and reject mismatches.
Model resource states, legal transitions, commands, representations, invariants, tombstones, and conflict outcomes independently of table layout.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Idempotency Key Fingerprint · Theory Idempotency Key Fingerprint
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 2837 in a administrative API crossing two identity and network trust zones. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; distinguish proxy evidence from origin evidence; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Idempotency Key Fingerprint contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Node and Express server Predict Idempotency Key Fingerprint · Theory Idempotency Key Fingerprint.
